hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT patients.ROI_Patients_Seq as patientSeq, patients.NAME as name, patients.SEX as gender, patients.DOB as dob, patients.SSN as ssn, patients.FACILITY as facility, patients.MRN as mrn, patients.EPN as epn, patients.LOCKOUT as patientLocked, 0 as encounterLocked, patients.VIP as vip FROM ROI_PATIENTS patients WHERE EXISTS (SELECT ROI_RequestCoreToROI_Patients.ROI_Patients_Seq FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreToROI_Patients ROI_RequestCoreToROI_Patients WHERE ROI_RequestCoreToROI_Patients.ROI_Patients_Seq = patients.ROI_Patients_Seq AND ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) UNION SELECT SupplementalPatients.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq as patientSeq, (case when SupplementalPatients.LASTNAME IS NULL then '' else SupplementalPatients.LASTNAME end + case when SupplementalPatients.FIRSTNAME = '' then '' when SupplementalPatients.FIRSTNAME IS NULL then '' else ', ' + SupplementalPatients.FIRSTNAME end) as name, SupplementalPatients.GENDER as gender, SupplementalPatients.DOB as dob, SupplementalPatients.SSN as ssn, SupplementalPatients.FACILITY as facility, SupplementalPatients.MRN as mrn, SupplementalPatients.EPN as epn, SupplementalPatients.PATIENTLOCKED as patientLocked, SupplementalPatients.ENCOUNTERLOCKED as encounterLocked, SupplementalPatients.VIP as vip FROM ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore SupplementalPatients WHERE EXISTS (SELECT ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore WHERE ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = SupplementalPatients.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) ORDER BY name

-- hpf patients non hpf documents SELECT patient.ROI_Patients_Seq as patientSeq, patient.Name as patientName, requestDelivery.Created_Dt as datetime, documentsCore.ENCOUNTER as enctr, 0 as selfPay, (RTRIM(LTRIM(documentsCore.DOCNAME)) + ' - ' + documentsCore.SUBTITLE) as documentVersionSubtitle, coalesce(documentsCore.PAGECOUNT, 0) as pages, (SELECT ReqPassword from ROI_RequestCore where ROI_RequestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq ) as requestPassword, requestDelivery.Queue_Password as queuePassword, shipping.Address1 as address1, shipping.Address2 as address2, shipping.Address3 as address3, shipping.City as city, shipping.State as state, shipping.PostalCode as zipcode, shipping.ShippingMethod as shippingMethod, shipping.TrackingNumber as trackingNumber, (SELECT users.NAME FROM cabinet..USERS users WHERE users.UserInstanceId = requestDelivery.created_BY_Seq AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) as userName, (SELECT users.UserInstanceId FROM cabinet..USERS users WHERE users.UserInstanceId = requestDelivery.created_BY_Seq AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) as userId FROM ROI_RequestCoreDelivery requestDelivery, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping shipping, ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore hpfDocs, ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore documentsCore, ROI_PATIENTS patient WHERE hpfDocs.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND documentsCore.ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore_Seq = hpfDocs.ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore_Seq AND documentsCore.ROI_Patients_Seq = patient.ROI_Patients_Seq AND shipping.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = (SELECT max(charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges charges, ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges chargesMapping WHERE chargesMapping.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND chargesMapping.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId
UNION
-- hpf patients hpf documents
SELECT DISTINCT(patients.ROI_Patients_Seq) as patientSeq, patients.name as patientName, requestDelivery.Created_Dt as datetime, encounters.ENCOUNTER as enctr, pagMapping.PAYOR_SELF_PAY as selfPay, RTRIM(LTRIM(documents.DOC_NAME)) + ' - '+ documents.SUBTITLE as documentVersionSubtitle, coalesce((Select COUNT(p.ROI_Pages_Seq) from ROI_Pages p, ROI_Versions v where v.ROI_Versions_Seq = p.ROI_Versions_Seq and v.ROI_Documents_Seq = documents.ROI_Documents_Seq), 0) as pages, --charges.Total_Pages_Released as pages, (SELECT ReqPassword from ROI_RequestCore where ROI_RequestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq ) as requestPassword, requestDelivery.Queue_Password as queuePassword, shipping.Address1 as address1, shipping.Address2 as address2, shipping.Address3 as address3, shipping.City as city, shipping.State as state, shipping.PostalCode as zipcode, shipping.ShippingMethod as shippingMethod, shipping.TrackingNumber as trackingNumber, (SELECT users.NAME FROM cabinet..USERS users WHERE users.UserInstanceId = requestDelivery.created_BY_Seq AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) as userName, (SELECT users.UserInstanceId FROM cabinet..USERS users WHERE users.UserInstanceId = requestDelivery.created_BY_Seq AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) as userId FROM ROI_PATIENTS patients, ROI_Encounters encounters , ROI_Documents documents, ROI_Versions versions, ROI_Pages page, ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_Pages pagMapping, ROI_RequestCoreDelivery requestDelivery, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping shipping
WHERE encounters.ROI_Patients_Seq = patients.ROI_Patients_Seq AND documents.ROI_Encounters_Seq = encounters.ROI_Encounters_Seq AND documents.ROI_Documents_Seq = versions.ROI_Documents_Seq AND pagMapping.ROI_Pages_seq = page.ROI_Pages_Seq AND pagMapping.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND page.ROI_Versions_Seq = versions.ROI_Versions_Seq AND shipping.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = (SELECT max(charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges charges, ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges chargesMapping WHERE chargesMapping.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND chargesMapping.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId
UNION
-- hpf patients global documents
SELECT DISTINCT(patients.ROI_Patients_Seq) as patientSeq, patients.name as patientName, requestDelivery.Created_Dt as datetime, '' as enctr, 0 as selfPay, RTRIM(LTRIM(documents.DOC_NAME)) + ' - '+ documents.SUBTITLE as documentVersionSubtitle, coalesce((Select COUNT(p.ROI_Pages_Seq) from ROI_Pages p, ROI_Versions v where v.ROI_Versions_Seq = p.ROI_Versions_Seq and v.ROI_Documents_Seq = documents.ROI_Documents_Seq), 0) as pages, --charges.Total_Pages_Released as pages, (SELECT ReqPassword from ROI_RequestCore where ROI_RequestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq ) as requestPassword, requestDelivery.Queue_Password as queuePassword, shipping.Address1 as address1, shipping.Address2 as address2, shipping.Address3 as address3, shipping.City as city, shipping.State as state, shipping.PostalCode as zipcode, shipping.ShippingMethod as shippingMethod, shipping.TrackingNumber as trackingNumber, (SELECT users.NAME FROM cabinet..USERS users WHERE users.UserInstanceId = requestDelivery.created_BY_Seq AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) as userName, (SELECT users.UserInstanceId FROM cabinet..USERS users WHERE users.UserInstanceId = requestDelivery.created_BY_Seq AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) as userId FROM ROI_PATIENTS patients, ROI_Encounters encounters, ROI_Documents documents, ROI_Versions versions, ROI_Pages page, ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_Pages pagMapping, ROI_RequestCoreDelivery requestDelivery, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping shipping
WHERE documents.ROI_Patients_Seq = patients.ROI_Patients_Seq AND documents.ROI_Encounters_Seq is null AND documents.ROI_Documents_Seq = versions.ROI_Documents_Seq AND pagMapping.ROI_Pages_seq = page.ROI_Pages_Seq AND pagMapping.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND page.ROI_Versions_Seq = versions.ROI_Versions_Seq AND shipping.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = (SELECT max(charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges charges, ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges chargesMapping WHERE chargesMapping.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND chargesMapping.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId
UNION
-- hpf patients Attachments SELECT DISTINCT(patients.ROI_Patients_Seq) as patientSeq, patients.name as patientName, requestDelivery.Created_Dt as datetime, ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore.ENCOUNTER as enctr, 0 as selfPay, ('Attachment - '+ ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore.SUBTITLE) as documentVersionSubtitle, coalesce(ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore.PAGECOUNT, 0) as pages, (SELECT ReqPassword from ROI_RequestCore where ROI_RequestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq ) as requestPassword, requestDelivery.Queue_Password as queuePassword, shipping.Address1 as address1, shipping.Address2 as address2, shipping.Address3 as address3, shipping.City as city, shipping.State as state, shipping.PostalCode as zipcode, shipping.ShippingMethod as shippingMethod, shipping.TrackingNumber as trackingNumber, (SELECT users.NAME FROM cabinet..USERS users WHERE users.UserInstanceId = requestDelivery.created_BY_Seq AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) as userName, (SELECT users.UserInstanceId FROM cabinet..USERS users WHERE users.UserInstanceId = requestDelivery.created_BY_Seq AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) as userId FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore, ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore, ROI_PATIENTS patients, ROI_RequestCoreDelivery requestDelivery, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping shipping
WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore.ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore_Seq = ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore.ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore_Seq AND ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore.ROI_Patients_Seq = patients.ROI_Patients_Seq AND ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND shipping.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = (SELECT max(charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges charges, ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges chargesMapping WHERE chargesMapping.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND chargesMapping.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId
UNION
-- non Hpf patients Non-hpf documents SELECT patient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq as patientSeq, (case when patient.LASTNAME IS NULL then '' else patient.LASTNAME end + case when patient.FIRSTNAME = '' then '' when patient.FIRSTNAME IS NULL then '' else ', ' + patient.FIRSTNAME end) as patientName, requestDelivery.Created_Dt as datetime, documentsCore.ENCOUNTER as enctr, 0 as selfPay, (RTRIM(LTRIM(documentsCore.DOCNAME)) + ' - ' + documentsCore.SUBTITLE) as documentVersionSubtitle, coalesce(documentsCore.PAGECOUNT, 0) as pages, (SELECT ReqPassword from ROI_RequestCore where ROI_RequestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq ) as requestPassword, requestDelivery.Queue_Password as queuePassword, shipping.Address1 as address1, shipping.Address2 as address2, shipping.Address3 as address3, shipping.City as city, shipping.State as state, shipping.PostalCode as zipcode, shipping.ShippingMethod as shippingMethod, shipping.TrackingNumber as trackingNumber, (SELECT users.NAME FROM cabinet..USERS users WHERE users.UserInstanceId = requestDelivery.created_BY_Seq AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) as userName, (SELECT users.UserInstanceId FROM cabinet..USERS users WHERE users.UserInstanceId = requestDelivery.created_BY_Seq AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) as userId FROM ROI_RequestCoreDelivery requestDelivery, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping shipping, ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore, ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore documentsCore, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore as patient WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND documentsCore.ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore_Seq = ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore.ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore_Seq AND documentsCore.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = patient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND shipping.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = (SELECT max(charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges charges, ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges chargesMapping WHERE chargesMapping.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND chargesMapping.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId
UNION
--Non hpf patiets attachments SELECT DISTINCT(patients.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq) as patientSeq, (case when patients.LASTNAME IS NULL then '' else patients.LASTNAME end + case when patients.FIRSTNAME = '' then '' when patients.FIRSTNAME IS NULL then '' else ', ' + patients.FIRSTNAME end) as patientName, requestDelivery.Created_Dt as datetime, ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore.ENCOUNTER as enctr, 0 as selfPay, ('Attachment - '+ ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore.SUBTITLE) as documentVersionSubtitle, coalesce(ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore.PAGECOUNT, 0) as pages, (SELECT ReqPassword from ROI_RequestCore where ROI_RequestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq ) as requestPassword, requestDelivery.Queue_Password as queuePassword, shipping.Address1 as address1, shipping.Address2 as address2, shipping.Address3 as address3, shipping.City as city, shipping.State as state, shipping.PostalCode as zipcode, shipping.ShippingMethod as shippingMethod, shipping.TrackingNumber as trackingNumber, (SELECT users.NAME FROM cabinet..USERS users WHERE users.UserInstanceId = requestDelivery.created_BY_Seq AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) as userName, (SELECT users.UserInstanceId FROM cabinet..USERS users WHERE users.UserInstanceId = requestDelivery.created_BY_Seq AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) as userId FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore, ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore as patients, ROI_RequestCoreDelivery requestDelivery, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping shipping
WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore.ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore_Seq = ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore.ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore_Seq AND patients.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND shipping.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = (SELECT max(charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges charges, ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges chargesMapping WHERE chargesMapping.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq AND chargesMapping.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) AND requestDelivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId
